negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The audited local code has no 0x0808 AGENT_CALL_PRECOMPILE accepted as async/two-phase/SPC-verified work, and the related sovereign agent path at 0x080C uses HttpCall capability rather than LLM.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-precompile-addresses/src/lib.rs defines SOVEREIGN_AGENT_PRECOMPILE at 0x080C and maps it to HttpCall capability.
crates/transaction-pool/src/pool/async_pool.rs treats current two-phase metadata as long-running, but there is no 0x0808 agent-call metadata.
crates/ritual-tee-registry-reader/src/types.rs explicitly does not consider AutonomousAgent an executor capability.

notes: Confirmed gap: related sovereign-agent support exists under 0x080C/HttpCall, but it is not the 0x0808 LLM-backed agent-call behavior required by the invariant.
rationale: The primary commit message and diff add AGENT_CALL_PRECOMPILE at 0x0808, include it in commitment validation and block verification filters, mark it as long-running in async pool state, extract max_poll_block for its Phase 2 TTL, and document that agent calls are served by executors with LLM capability. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: The 0x0808 agent-call precompile must be accepted as an async precompile in commitment validation, treated as a long-running two-phase async transaction by the async pool, included in block-verification/SPC async precompile filtering, and use the LLM executor capability rather than requiring a distinct AgentCall executor capability.
suggested_falsification_tests: Submit an async commitment for precompile 0x0808 with an LLM-capable executor and valid max_poll_block; assert commitment validation accepts it, async-pool metadata reports is_long_running, block verification recognizes its SPC call as async, and an otherwise identical unsupported precompile address is rejected.
summary: The 0x0808 LLM-backed agent-call async path is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Submit a 0x0808 agent-call commitment with an LLM executor; current metadata lookup treats 0x0808 as unsupported, exposing the missing invariant behavior.
title: Agent calls are long-running async work
